items.title: Study the pattern
items.body:
Workbook lesson 10: Conversation 10. Read the sentences, listen, and repeat.

Examples:
• Do you understand Spanish?
• 2- Do you speak English at home? / Portuguese / French
• 5- Do you want to go to the movies today? / park / downtown
• 2- Do you __________________________________________________________________

items.prompt: I don’t understand Spanish. I understand only English.

items.text: 2- Do you speak English at home? / Portuguese / French

items.prompt: 3- Do you have a big car? / small / new / old
options: 2- Do you speak English at home? / Portuguese / French 3.
2- Do you speak English at home? / Portuguese / French
French / Portuguese / home? at English speak you Do 2-
2- Do you speak English at home? / Portuguese / French 2.

items.text: 5- Do you want to go to the movies today? / park / downtown
